channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: NetOne Launches ‘Freedom Bundles’ to Boost Affordable Connectivity Across Zimbabwe @263Chat @NetOneCellular
item.description: State-owned mobile network operator NetOne has unveiled a new range of “Freedom Bundles” expanding its prepaid offerings with voice, SMS and data packages as it seeks to improve affordable access to digital communication across Zimbabwe. The new bundles replace the company’s long #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Sangomas Want HIV Test Kits As Traditional Healers Warn Of Patients Dying
item.description: Sangomas And Traditional Healers Make Major HIV Testing Kits Appeal Sangomas and traditional healers in Zimbabwe have made a major appeal for HIV rapid testing kits as they push for a bigger role in early diagnosis and patient referrals. The practitioners say testing patients on #Zimbabwe #Health #ZimbabweHealth #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: ‘We Had No Choice’: Zimbabwean Family Sells Everything and Leaves South Africa (video)
item.description: Watch the heartbreaking moment a Zimbabwean family explains why leaving South Africa became their only option for survival and hope. The post ‘We Had No Choice’: Zimbabwean Family Sells Everything and Leaves South Africa (video) appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: CFAO Zimbabwe launches hybrid SUV as demand for fuel-efficient vehicles grows

item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: 827 Zimbabwe ex-WENELA workers lodge compensation claims
item.description: Theseus Shambare A TOTAL of 827 former Zimbabwean WENELA mineworkers and their dependants have lodged compensation claims with the Tshiamiso Trust as the organisation intensifies efforts to process claims for... #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zim Photographer’s Childhood Journey Takes Centre Stage in New International Exhibition @263Chat
item.description: Zimbabwean documentary photographer Tafadzwa Mupfururirwa Kufa is showcasing a deeply personal body of work exploring childhood, migration and identity in a new exhibition titled A Narrow Escape, bringing an intimate Zimbabwean story to an international audience. The exhibition d #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Sadc turns aid cuts into blueprint for health self-reliance
item.description: Oliver Kazunga Senior Reporter A STEEP decline in foreign health funding is being recast by Zimbabwe and other Southern African Development Community (Sadc) countries as an opportunity to build stronger,... #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Suzuki Unveils Premium Hybrid SUV as CFAO Mobility Expands Zim Investment @263Chat
item.description: By Tinomudaishe Muzanenhamo CFAO Mobility Zimbabwe has unveiled the all-new Suzuki Across, a premium mild hybrid sport utility vehicle (SUV) as the company steps up its investment in Zimbabwe’s automotive sector amid rising demand for fuel-efficient, technologically advanced vehi #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Thabani Maguranyanga Launches Flag Football Revolution @263Chat
item.description: By Shalom Shawurwa Former Zimbabwe Cheetahs rugby player Thabani “TJ” Maguranyanga has launched Zimbabwe’s first major flag football development camp introducing the fast-growing American sport to local schoolchildren while pursuing his own dream of securing a place in the Nation #Zimbabwe #Sport #ZimbabweSport #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Government Recovers 30 Cars in Zimbabwe’s US$15 Million Massive Corruption Crackdown... Here are the names of ‘vanhu vanyura so far’!
item.description: Harare – The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) of Zimbabwe has announced a significant recovery of nearly US$15 million from criminal proceeds, a move widely lauded as a major step in the fight against pervasive corruption. However, beneath the surface of this apparent victory lies a complex web of illicit activities that raises more questions than [...] The post Government Recovers 30 Cars in Zimbabwe’s US$15 Million Massive Corruption Crackdown... Here are the names of ‘vanhu vanyura so far’! first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bulawayo council road levy usage under spotlight
item.description: Nqobile Bhebhe, THE City of Bulawayo could be collecting as much as US$3,1 million annually from its Roads Levy, exceeding its 2025 Zimbabwe National Road Administration (Zinara) allocation of... (via Ebusiness Weekly) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Man charged over trafficking of job seekers into Russia’s war effort
item.description: One recruit reported dead on war front The post Man charged over trafficking of job seekers into Russia’s war effort appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Chivayo not under investigation in South Africa over ZEC election procurement allegations – Hawks say @wicknellchivayo
item.description: South Africa’s Directorate for Priority Crime Investigation (Hawks) has said that controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo is not under investigation over allegations linked to the procurement of election materials for Zimbabwe’s 2023 harmonised elections. The clarification follows claims that South African authorities were investigating Chivayo for alleged money laundering and fraud involving the procurement of election [...] The post Chivayo not under investigation in South Africa over ZEC election procurement allegations – Hawks say appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: UK: Jameson Mashakada receives MBE for advancing race equality in King’s Birthday Honours
item.description: UK-based Zimbabwean Jameson Mashakada has been awarded the Member of the Order of the British Empire (MBE) in His Majesty The King’s Birthday Honours List 2026 in recognition of his services to race equality, diversity and inclusion across the UK Civil Service. Mashakada, an accomplished UK civil servant, has served for 22 years across several [...] The post UK: Jameson Mashakada receives MBE for advancing race equality in King’s Birthday Honours appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Paratus and Powertel light up first phase of Zimbabwe fibre backbone
item.description: Paratus and Powertel light up first phase of Zimbabwe fibre backbone — via Developing Telecoms #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Developing Telecoms

item.title: Zimbabwean migrant allegedly killed in South Africa’s Mpumalanga amid continuing xenophobic attacks
item.description: FEAR is spreading among migrant communities in Mpumalanga, South Africa, after allegations surfaced last week of a deadly attack on a Zimbabwean national. The incident occurred as anti-immigrant protestors combed the area in the aftermath of the June 30 deadline for foreigners to leave South Africa. According to an audio recording that has gone viral [...] The post Zimbabwean migrant allegedly killed in South Africa’s Mpumalanga amid continuing xenophobic attacks appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: More buses deployed as thousands of Zimbabweans and Malawians await repatriation at Musina border
item.description: By Simon Majadibodu l IOL THE Department of Home Affairs says at least 50 buses are expected to arrive at the Musina Repatriation Centre to help clear a growing backlog as thousands of Zimbabwean and Malawian nationals wait to return home. The move comes as anti-migrant organisations continue to call for undocumented immigrants to leave [...] The post More buses deployed as thousands of Zimbabweans and Malawians await repatriation at Musina border appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Shocking Insider Revelation: Thoma Mapfumo’s Closest Allies Reveal What He will Do as Chivayo Offers Him US$1.5 Million @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A Million-Dollar Dilemma: Thomas Mapfumo’s Crossroads Harare – A staggering US$1.5 million offer from controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo has ignited a fervent debate across Zimbabwe, placing legendary Chimurenga musician Thomas Mapfumo, affectionately known as Mukanya, at a pivotal moment in his illustrious career. The proposition, extended during Jah Prayzah’s 39th birthday celebrations, earmarks a substantial [...] The post Shocking Insider Revelation: Thoma Mapfumo’s Closest Allies Reveal What He will Do as Chivayo Offers Him US$1.5 Million first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News
